title: synth_ice40 -flowmap terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::length_error'   what():  vector::reserve
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

```
read_verilog e.v
synth_ice40 -flowmap
```

e.v:
```verilog
module test
  (
   input wire [11:0] x,
   input wire [1:0] y,
   output wire [11:0] z,
   );

assign z = x >> y;

endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

No crash.

## Actual behavior

```
[...]
2.41. Executing FLOWMAP pass (pack LUTs with FlowMap).
Labeling cells.
Mapped to 24 LUTs with maximum depth 2.

Packing cells.
Packing test.$techmap$shr$/home/corecode/tmp/e.v:8$1.$auto$simplemap.cc:278:simplemap_mux$584.\Y (\z [11]).
  Packing test.$techmap$shr$/home/corecode/tmp/e.v:8$1.$auto$simplemap.cc:278:simplemap_mux$620.\Y ($techmap$shr$/home/corecode/tmp/e.v:8$1.$1\buffer[11:0] [11]).
terminate called after throwing an instance of 'std::length_error'
  what():  vector::reserve
zsh: IOT instruction (core dumped)  ./yosys
```
code_blocks:
[...]

Labeling cells.
Mapped to 24 LUTs with maximum depth 2.

Packing cells.
Packing test.$techmap$shr$/home/corecode/tmp/e.v:8$1.$auto$simplemap.cc:278:simplemap_mux$584.\Y (\z [11]).
  Packing test.$techmap$shr$/home/corecode/tmp/e.v:8$1.$auto$simplemap.cc:278:simplemap_mux$620.\Y ($techmap$shr$/home/corecode/tmp/e.v:8$1.$1\buffer[11:0] [11]).

  what():  vector::reserve
zsh: IOT instruction (core dumped)  ./yosys
